text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My top oshi from the younger<n>generation is
running in the NHK Mile<n>Cup—like me last year—so
I've<n>brought some friends to the<n>racecourse to
support her!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And OMG she did AMAZING. I'veseen so many runners up until now,and now I'm witnessing the birth of anew generation. Uh-oh, I think myfeels are starting to get to me. Somebody help.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm no longer just chasing after my<n>favorite
Umas. Now the next<n>generation is chasing after
me! I need<n>to set a good example for them.
